title: Hurt On Condition
description: Defines a set of conditions under which an entity should take damage.

damage_conditions.title: Damage Conditions
damage_conditions.description:
List of damage conditions that when met can cause damage to the entity.

Properties:
• cause (string)
• damage_per_tick (int) = 1
• filters

Sample values:
• allay: [{"cause":"lava","damage_per_tick":4,"filters":...

cause.title: Cause
cause.description: The kind of damage that is caused to the entity. Various armors and spells use this to determine if the entity is immune.

damage_per_tick.title: Damage Per Tick
damage_per_tick.description: The amount of damage done each tick that the conditions are met.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: The set of conditions that must be satisfied before the entity takes the defined damage.
